$comment: MVP roadmap. INTENT + PREDICATES, never hand-written status. Compute: npm run flowmap:mvp. Many checks start as manual (artifact paths not yet decided); convert to file/grep/cmd as artifacts land. MVP_PLAN.md checkboxes are personal record only — this file is truth.
spine: rename -> tooling-enforceable -> interface -> readability -> foreign-repo -> recorded-demo

items.title: Rename to novakai
items.intent: flowmap is the top project; rename repo/package to novakai after resolving collision with existing NovaKai text-editor repo. Sweep stale path refs.

checks.note: Collision with existing NovaKai repo resolved; plan/handoff path refs swept.

items.title: Tooling audit complete (AUD0-AUD5)
items.intent: Every claimed guarantee inventoried, classified, pressure-tested; findings fixed via loop. Detail: docs/flowmap/audit/audit-roadmap.json.

checks.note: AUD5 fix plans complete per flowmap:status.

items.title: Protocol hooks live
items.intent: Session-protocol rules become machine gates: quiz-gate on Edit|Write, plan-check on ExitPlanMode, ship-staleness in Stop hook.

items.title: Compliance metrics
items.intent: Quantified trust: quiz pass rate, cert pass rate, gate-deny count, PASS_UNPROVEN ratio over N loop runs. Converts trust from one green run to a number.

items.title: ViewSpec contract
items.intent: Serializable ViewSpec JSON; renderer = pure function of spec; checkboxes and future LLM both write same spec. Every migrated feature lands as render(spec), no direct DOM-toggle handlers.

items.title: Read (unfold) migrated to main app
items.intent: Reading mode is a main-app surface, ViewSpec-driven, not a sandbox prototype — and the surface the app boots into (P1 flip: sticky surface choice, default read, via a pure acceptance-tested decision).

items.title: Feature migration complete
items.intent: import, mmd sync, slice, plan view, diff workspace, export, frontmatter — all present in main app via ViewSpec.

checks.note: Per-feature checks added as each migration plan is authored (one plan per feature).

items.title: Readability: enforceable conventions + incremental refactor
items.intent: Human-readable defined as checkable conventions (naming, function length, comments), not prose. Refactor per-touched-module through full loop; no big-bang rewrite.

checks.note: Convert to grep/cmd when convention doc or lint rule lands.

items.title: Foreign-repo run (react-dev)
items.intent: Full pipeline on a repo flowmap did not grow around. Portability breaks fixed. Kills N=1 self-referential validation.

checks.note: Convert to cmd when react-dev has _bundle.mmd + green gate.

items.title: Recorded end-to-end demo (MVP exit)
items.intent: 0-context agent -> onboard -> quiz 100 -> English feature request -> plan -> human review in ViewSpec editor -> approve -> orchestrate -> acceptance green -> writeback, on react-dev, recorded. This recording is the MVP demonstration.

checks.note: Recording exists + each spine step verifiable by command from the recording's session artifacts.
